en.title: Thesis reply
en.prompt: Write a highly detailed essay with introduction, body, and conclusion paragraphs responding to the following: [question or essay prompt]
en.remark: Discussing questions in essay form allows for coherent, structured and higher quality responses.

related.title: Scademician
related.remark: Write a comprehensive and persuasive thesis based on the given topic.

related.title: Novelist
related.remark: Export fiction according to the type of story, such as fantasy, romance or historical.

related.title: Weekly Report Generator
related.remark: Extract key points from daily work tasks and expand them appropriately to generate a weekly report.

metaDescription: Generate detailed, structured essays with clear introduction, body, and conclusion paragraphs for any thesis or topic.

faq.q: Is an essay-style answer very different from a normal answer?
faq.a: Very much so. A normal answer focuses on key takeaways, while an essay-style response gives you an introduction, argument by sections, and a conclusion, plus background and counterpoints. It suits homework, exams, or questions that need to show depth of reasoning. It is not the right format for operational questions like "how do I cook this."

faq.q: Can I hand in the generated essay directly?
faq.a: Do not treat it as a finished product. The AI will fabricate authoritative-sounding but nonexistent references and statistics. Verify every citation actually exists, and rewrite paragraphs in your own words to avoid getting flagged by plagiarism detectors.
